description: Fig. 5: Favorable review but poor sales scenario (regular lattice)

expected_outcome.description: Agent attitudes converge toward positive values (avg ~72), but only a small fraction adopt the product. Demonstrates the 'best game no one played' phenomenon.
expected_outcome.GSI: Low (very few agents adopt, e.g., GSI ~0.02)

note: This scenario uses identical parameters to Fig. 4 except avg-of-thresholds=40 and std-of-thresholds=10, demonstrating the critical role of adoption thresholds.
